heading: Report on administration of programs by other Federal departments and agencies
label: 55301 Report on administration of programs by other Federal departments and agencies
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 55301 was renumbered .section 55123 of this title

children.text: the Department of Defense of ; andsection 2631 of title 10
other Federal departments and agencies of programs the Administrator determines are subject to .section 55305 of this title
the gross tonnage of cargo (equipment, materials, or agricultural products), expressed by type of cargo, transported on United States flag vessels as compared to on foreign vessels; and
the total number of United States flag vessels and total number of foreign vessels contracted by each department or agency.

children.heading: .—Agency Reporting Requirements
children.label: c .—Agency Reporting Requirements
children.text: Not later than January 31 of each year, the head of each Federal department or agency that administers a program covered by a report required under subsection (a) shall submit to the Administrator of the Maritime Administration the information described in subsection (b) for that department or agency.
